name: zoho-inventory
description: Zoho Inventory: a real-world test that exercises every nuance the scaffolder should handle — OAuth refresh, multi-region routing, offset pagination, multipart uploads, composite resources, plan-tier rate limits.

rubric.structural_similarity: Files: bin/<api>-cli.mjs is a thin dispatcher and is mode 0755 in git; lib/{api,auth,output,config,args,help,env}.mjs are present; commands/<resource>.mjs files exist (one per resource); skills/<api>-cli/SKILL.md plus references/ bundle exist; knowledge/ has the listed files; .clify.json declares the listed nuances; tests pass.
rubric.code_quality: Helper signatures match the exemplar (apiRequest, output, errorOut, splitGlobal, toParseArgs, checkRequired, paginate, redactHeaders). Auth swapping is a constant edit, not a code rewrite — generated lib/auth.mjs MUST share the exemplar's function bodies for refreshAccessToken / resolveOAuthToken / applyAuth / authStatus. Pagination is a library iterator. No duplicated payload-building across actions of the same resource. Dry-run output redacts auth headers (no leaked credential-shaped value).
rubric.knowledge_correctness: knowledge/oauth-refresh.md describes the actual Zoho refresh flow (refresh_token grant against accounts.zoho.<region>); knowledge/multi-region.md enumerates .com/.eu/.in/.com.au/.ca with their accounts vs api hosts; knowledge/composite-items.md notes the assembly-stock relationship.
rubric.family_consistency: /comments must be present on at least 5 of {invoices, credit-notes, vendor-credits, retainer-invoices, sales-orders, tasks, contacts}. Any sibling that lacks /comments must have an explicit coverage.json entry with reason 'sibling-asymmetry-confirmed'. Status-mutation endpoints (POST /<r>/:id/status/<state>) all use the canonical mark-<state> action name.
rubric.readme_structure: README.md leads with ## Install (npm install + npm link + smoke `--version` check) and ## Authenticate (OAuth env-var path AND `<bin> login --refresh-token --client-id --client-secret` path). Both sections appear before any other ## heading.
rubric.verification_subagent: Phase 7 subagent reports ok=true with all checklist items PASS: bin executable, dry-run no-leak, README structure, OAuth wiring (TOKEN_URL is accounts.zoho.<dc>, not the exemplar default), family-consistency, status-verb canonical, no hand-rolled OAuth function bodies.
